evals.prompt: 변경된 코드의 보안, 호환성, 코드 품질을 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: BP-01~BP-14 기준으로 대상 파일 분석, 구체적 이슈 식별
expectations: Analyzes actual target files for issues (not just lists items)
Identifies specific security issues in target files (e.g., http:// links, innerHTML usage)
Checks browser compatibility issues (e.g., vendor prefixes, API support)
References BP item IDs (BP-01 through BP-14) in findings
Provides fix recommendations for identified issues

evals.prompt: dashboard.tsx의 보안 취약점을 best-practices 기준으로 점검해줘
evals.expected_output: XSS, CSRF, 입력 검증 등 보안 항목 중심 분석
expectations: Focuses on security BP items (BP-01 through BP-05)
Maps findings to specific BP item IDs

evals.prompt: Card.tsx 컴포넌트의 코드 품질과 호환성을 리뷰해줘
expectations: Evaluates code quality items (consistent naming, type safety, error handling)
Checks browser compatibility (CSS features, JS APIs)
Provides specific code examples for each finding
Suggests concrete fixes with code snippets
